title: Talent Acquisition Manager
description:
• Lead end-to-end technical recruitment for enterprise technology and digital transformation roles across global markets.

  • Demonstrate deep expertise in niche technologies including SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, AI/ML, cloud, data platforms, and enterprise applications.

  • Act as a strategic talent advisor to clients and internal stakeholders on hiring strategy, workforce planning, and market intelligence.

  • Apply strong understanding of talent markets across South East Asia and Australia, including supply-demand dynamics, compensation trends, and candidate mobility.

  • Possess solid knowledge of labor laws, employment regulations, taxation frameworks, and compliance requirements across ASEAN countries and Australia.

  • Provide advisory on talent and market entry strategies in Europe and Latin America, leveraging knowledge of local languages, cultural context, employee sentiment, hiring models, and engagement practices.

  • Design and execute large-scale Hire–Train–Deploy (HTD) programs across Singapore and ASEAN, including workforce planning and deployment models.

  • Deliver senior-level hiring for large-scale digital transformation programs across the Eastern Hemisphere.

  • Recruit niche technology consultants across diverse regions including South Africa, China, Korea, Japan, Vietnam, Australia, Indonesia, and other strategic markets.

  • Build and maintain strong talent pipelines for hard-to-find skills across global markets.

  • Implement structured recruitment workflows, including timesheet processes, documentation standards, and operational best practices.

  • Develop training materials and recruitment playbooks; mentor and train junior recruitment team members.

  • Leverage CRM, ATS, and sourcing tools to improve recruitment efficiency and data-driven decision-making.

  • Partner closely with business leaders, delivery teams, and clients to align talent acquisition with transformation and growth objectives.

Must-have skills and experience:

  • Minimum 8 years of experience in technical recruitment, executive search, or specialist technology hiring.

  • Proven track record of successful placements and revenue/billing performance in enterprise technology and niche IT domains.

  • Demonstrated experience hiring for SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, AI, cloud, and digital transformation roles.

  • Strong experience recruiting across multiple geographies, particularly ASEAN and Australia.

  • Proven capability in senior and niche technology hiring for large-scale programs.

  • Experience in managing complex stakeholder environments and senior client relationships.

  • Strong commercial acumen, negotiation skills, and ability to close high-value roles.

  • Hands-on experience using CRM, ATS, and modern recruitment tools and methodologies.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
